title: Resolute Resolutions
snippet: Greetings fellow denizens of this celestial rock ball to which we are tethered!We have done it. We have passed through ‘the year which shall not be named’ (and let’s not forget 2019 either!), stepped into a new decade, and taken our first breaths of that 2021 air! We all experienced many hardship...

title: Hello World
snippet: Hello world, and welcome to my little corner of the web! My name is David and I have skirted the idea of making a dev blog for a long while and felt that with 2020 closing, 2021 is a perfect chance to turn over new leaves, indulge in some writing therapy, and give it a shot. I cannot promise that...
